notes: Tech/chip rout persists into the afternoon, VIX 19.5 and PCE inflation data looming; day P&L -$45.5k off the open lows but tape still ugly with global AI doubts and rate jitters. Holding risk-off at 0.30 — no chasing falling chip names, AMC diluting via $200M offering.
journal_entry: Mid-afternoon Tuesday, day -$45.5k (improved from -$55k open). Regime unchanged risk-off/0.30. Chips still the epicenter; added AMC dilution risk and weak SPY/WBI to avoids. Only defensive DTE and resilient AAL (+13%) look constructive. Watching for chip stabilization and PCE print before re-risking — let winners ride, no buying knives.
